About Me

Data at the heart of
public health.

I'm a Senior Health Information Officer with the Ghana Health Service, based in Jomoro Municipal, Western Region. My work sits at the crossroads of health systems and data — collecting, validating, and transforming facility-level data into intelligence that supports district health management decisions.

Over 5 years, I've developed a deep technical skillset that goes well beyond traditional HIO work. I write automation scripts, build interactive dashboards, create geospatial maps, and design data pipelines — because I believe that better tools mean better data, and better data means better health outcomes.

I'm equally committed to knowledge sharing — training fellow HIOs, simplifying complex workflows, and building tools that the entire district health system can use.

Projects

Tools built for
real problems.

Every project here solves an actual challenge I faced in Ghana's health information system.

Featured Project ★ Open Source

DHIMS2 Monthly Dataset Auto-Complete

A Python script that interfaces with the DHIMS2 REST API to automatically mark all health facility datasets as complete for the previous month — across every facility in a district. Replaces hours of manual clicking with a single double-click.

Python REST API DHIS2 JSON Automation

Power BI · Analytics ★ New

Healthcare Intelligence: Insights from Advanced Analytics

A multi-page Power BI dashboard delivering end-to-end healthcare intelligence across four analytical domains — Medical, Patients, Financials, and Admissions. Built to surface trends, KPIs, and actionable insights from complex healthcare datasets using advanced DAX measures and interactive visuals.

Power BI DAX Healthcare Data Data Modelling Advanced Analytics

🏥 Medical — Condition KPIs, treatment costs, length of stay & admission types by condition
